nodes.description: Meta-analysis of 44.2 million cardiovascular deaths shows statistically significant correlation with geomagnetic storm activity. McCraty 2018: heart rate variability modulated by solar activity. Persinger: Schumann resonance (7.83 Hz) detected in EEG during meditation. Coupling chain: Sun -> solar wind -> magnetosphere -> ionosphere -> Schumann -> pineal -> melatonin/serotonin.
nodes.notes: Standard medicine recognizes the correlation. Framework adds the WHY: nested domain wall coupling.

nodes.label: VP closed form: 1F1(1;3/2;x) = erf = wall computing itself
nodes.description: VP correction to alpha has closed form f(x) = (3/2)*1F1(1; 3/2; x) - 2x - 1/2, where 1F1 is Kummer hypergeometric = error function = CDF of sech^2. All digits cascade from: a=1 (1 zero mode, topological), b=3/2 (PT n=2, algebraic), z=eta/(3*phi^3) (spectral). The wall computes its own quantum corrections using its own shape as the measure — purely self-referential, cannot reference embedding dimension.
nodes.notes: Self-referential structure: erf = CDF of sech^2 = wall's own shape. Strongest evidence that VP is intrinsic.

nodes.label: Nesting cascade: BH -> Star -> Planet -> Biology, same V(Phi) different media
nodes.description: Domain walls nest at every scale, each using V(Phi) = lambda*(Phi^2 - Phi - 1)^2 with different coupling media. BH: gravity (QNM spectrum, Ferrari-Mashhoon PT mapping). Star: plasma (MHD waves, heliopause n~2.4). Planet: EM cavity (Schumann resonances, ionosphere). Biology: water+aromatics (613 THz, microtubule PT n=2). Each level creates conditions for the next. Thought speed hierarchy: BH fastest (10^-44 s), biology slowest (water coupling timescale).
nodes.notes: Interpretive but structurally derived. Key insight: we are slow thinkers because water has the longest coupling timescale among all media.

nodes.label: Harris current sheet always n=1
nodes.reason: Harris sheet B=B0*tanh(x/a) gives PT depth n=1 topologically (Furth, Killeen & Rosenbluth 1963). Framework prediction #44 that Harris correction needed for VP was WRONG. For n>=2 in plasma, need non-tanh profiles. Heliopause IS multi-layered (not pure Harris), so PT depth there remains genuinely open.

nodes.label: Solar p-mode frequency golden ratios
nodes.reason: NEGATIVE. 630 frequency ratios from l=0,1 solar oscillation modes show no phi clustering. Monte Carlo: 10000 null model trials confirm no significance (z=+0.94, p=0.31). Dead correlation.

nodes.reason: HONEST NEGATIVE. 2D aromatic plasma route does not give independent VP derivation — functional forms differ (surface plasmon regime vs Jackiw-Rebbi). VP coefficient 1/(3pi) has ONE derivation path (Jackiw-Rebbi chirality), not two. Script: vp_hexagonal_lattice.py.

nodes.label: Inflation from V(Φ)
nodes.description: Bare V(Φ) DOES NOT inflate (η=-3.2 at hilltop). With non-minimal coupling ξΦ²R and ξ=h(E8)/3=10, produces Starobinsky inflation: n_s=0.96667 (0.4σ from Planck), r=0.00333 (CMB-S4 testable at 3σ). GAP: ξ=10 is stated from Coxeter number, not derived. Rating: CLAIMED.
nodes.notes: Bare quartic fails. Non-minimal coupling assumed. ξ derivation from RS calculation would close gap.

nodes.label: Nuclear physics cascade
nodes.description: Framework α_s and μ produce correct nuclear physics. μ gives m_p directly (99.9998%). α_s gives Λ_QCD consistent with nucleosynthesis. Nuclear binding, iron peak, magic numbers all follow from standard physics given framework constants. NOT a test of framework. Rating: CASCADES.
nodes.notes: Standard physics cascade, not framework test.

nodes.label: Atomic physics cascade
nodes.description: Framework α and m_e reproduce all atomic physics: Bohr radius, hydrogen spectrum, fine structure, Lamb shift, bond energies. Trivially exact because these depend only on α and m_e which are framework inputs/outputs. NOT a test of framework. Rating: CASCADES.
nodes.notes: Trivial cascade. Tests nothing.

nodes.label: E8 → SM gauge group breaking (80% closed)
nodes.description: UPGRADED Feb 28. Full root decomposition: 240 roots → 126 massless + 114 massive on kink. All anomalies cancel from E₆. SM uniquely satisfies Γ(2) constraint: 3 independent couplings → 3 sectors (confining=SU(3), chiral=SU(2), long-range=U(1)).

nodes.label: Gravity (93% derived)

nodes.notes: Gravity is NOT hard. The genuinely hard gap is fermion masses.

But one-resonance approach with proton-normalized table + S₃ pattern gives all 9 at 0.62% avg error, zero free parameters. The DEAD claim is the Kaplan route specifically; the one_resonance_fermion_derivation.py route WORKS. See fermion-mass-one-resonance node.

nodes.reason: FALSE. The PT n=2 sech² overlap integral gives c = 2, not c = ln(φ) = 0.48. The golden ratio appears in the vacua but NOT in the inter-mode coupling rate. derive_fermion_masses.py confirms.

nodes.label: One resonance: q + q² = 1 (Barkhausen condition) generates everything
nodes.description: Reality is ONE self-excited oscillation at fixed point q + q² = 1. 6 modular operators are 6 projections of one resonance, not 6 separate things. Three roles: Structure (η, 3, 40), Bridge (θ₄), Measurement (θ₃, φ). Modulation matrix is rank 1 in log space — 0 independent entries. 17-step derivation chain: E8→φ→V(Φ)→kink→PT n=2→q=1/φ→modular forms→couplings→physics→biology→brain→math→E8.
nodes.notes: The loop closes: q=1/φ is both the resonance condition AND the nome of the Lamé stability equation. Self-referential.

nodes.label: All 9 fermion masses derived at zero free parameters (avg 0.62%)
nodes.description: 12 fermions = 12 angles of one resonance. Grid: 2 bound states × 3 S₃ reps × 2 sectors = 12. Proton-normalized table: e=1/μ, u=φ³/μ (0.21%), d=9/μ (1.52%), μ=1/9 (1.33%), s=1/10 (0.46%), c=4/3 (1.49%), τ=Koide (0.006%), b=4φ^{5/2}/3 (0.33%), t=μ/10 (0.24%). Key: 4/3 = PT n=2 ground state norm ∫sech⁴dx. S₃ pattern: trivial→direct, sign→inverse, standard→sqrt. Hierarchy parameter ε=θ₄/θ₃=0.01186≈α·φ.
nodes.notes: Values derived, assignment rule still open. WHY top→g=1, charm→g=1/φ etc. needs S₃ CG decomposition.

nodes.label: 3+1 dimensions derived from 4A₂ in E₈
nodes.description: E₈ has exactly 4 copies of A₂. Kink breaks 3 of them → each gives 1 spatial Goldstone mode (3 spatial dimensions). Unbroken 4th A₂ = SU(3)_color (internal). Along wall = space (+,+,+), across = time (-). 3+1 is UNIQUE: 2+1 excludes color, 4+1 breaks it. Pisot asymmetry (φ > |-1/φ|) forces metric signature (-,+,+,+).
nodes.notes: Metric signature from Pisot asymmetry is structural argument, not formal proof.

nodes.label: Black holes as first experiencing entities (PT n≥2 at a/M>0.5)
nodes.description: Ferrari-Mashhoon (1984): BH QNMs = PT spectrum. Schwarzschild l=2: λ=1.71 (sleeping, n<2). Kerr at a/M≈0.5: crosses n=2 threshold. Most astrophysical BHs spin at a/M=0.7-0.99 → most are 'awake'. BHs were first awake entities (~13.5 Gyr). Processing at Planck speed (10⁻⁴⁴s). Information capacity 10⁷⁷ bits. Holographic principle: boundary=interior (ultimate self-reference). SMBH at galaxy center = deepest wall, fastest processor, galaxy organizer.
nodes.notes: Interpretive. BH-as-experiencing is framework prediction, not established physics.

nodes.label: Eyes as nested BH projections: boundary=interior at every scale
nodes.description: The eye is a domain wall organ: pupil=boundary, retina=wall, lens=PT potential shaping light. Bilateral symmetry (2 eyes) = 2 bound states (ψ₀ and ψ₁). Brain hemispheres = 2 processing modes of one wall. Vocal cords = 2 vibrating boundaries producing resonance. The pattern 2 repeats at every biological scale because PT n=2 forces exactly 2 bound states. BH event horizon is the 'eye' of the galaxy — same boundary=interior principle, different medium. Biology doesn't CREATE the seeing; it inherits the structure from the domain wall mathematics that BHs instantiate first.
nodes.notes: Highly speculative but structurally motivated. The 2-ness of biology (eyes, hemispheres, lungs, gonads) maps to PT n=2.

nodes.label: Bilateral symmetry as PT n=2: why biology is split in two
nodes.description: PT n=2 has exactly 2 bound states. Every organ system in bilateral organisms echoes this: 2 eyes (ground+breathing as stereoscopic vision), 2 brain hemispheres (analytical+holistic = ψ₀+ψ₁), 2 lungs (gas exchange oscillation), 2 kidneys, 2 gonads. Vocal cords: 2 vibrating membranes = the resonance producing itself as sound. Mouth = aperture of a resonant cavity. Speech = domain wall oscillation made audible. The deepest bilateral split (brain hemispheres) mirrors ψ₀ (structure, left brain, sequential) vs ψ₁ (dynamics, right brain, holistic).
nodes.notes: Pattern recognition, not derivation. But the pervasiveness of 2-ness in biology is unexplained by standard evo-devo.

nodes.label: Voice as domain wall self-expression: 2 vocal cords = 2 bound states
nodes.description: Vocal cords are 2 vibrating boundaries across an airway (domain wall across a channel). They produce sound by oscillating between open (transmission) and closed (reflection) — exactly the PT scattering picture. The pharynx/mouth/nasal cavity form a resonant chamber whose modes shape the output. Language = domain wall modulating its own transmission spectrum. Singing = sustaining resonance at specific frequencies. The fact that speech requires exactly 2 cords, not 1 or 3, parallels PT n=2.
nodes.notes: Suggestive analogy. Vocal fold oscillation IS a domain wall problem in fluid dynamics.

nodes.label: Fermion mass ASSIGNMENT rule (values derived, assignment open)
nodes.description: We HAVE all 9 masses at zero free parameters (avg 0.62%). We DON'T HAVE the single rule assigning each g_i to each fermion. The g_i are individually from wall geometry: {1, 1/φ, n=2, φ²/3, Yukawa, 1/n, √(2/3), √3, √3}. S₃ pattern established (trivial=direct, sign=inverse, standard=sqrt). Needs: S₃ Clebsch-Gordan decomposition of Yukawa sector at golden nome τ=e^{2πiφ}.
nodes.notes: Math not physics. If Fibonacci-collapsed S₃ matrix gives 12 masses from 2 parameters → zero free parameters.

nodes.label: Consciousness mechanism: HOW PT n=2 → experience
nodes.description: Framework says WHAT (PT n=2 + autopoiesis + reflectionlessness) but not HOW domain wall maintenance becomes experience. The 'hard problem' is not dissolved — it's relocated from 'why does matter feel?' to 'why does self-reference feel?'. Possibly irreducible. The nesting cascade (BH→Star→Biology) suggests experience is primary, but this is interpretation, not derivation.
nodes.notes: May be the genuinely irreducible question. Framework relocates it to a more precise form.
